paragraphs: With over 20 years in the software industry, I specialize in distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and clean architecture. My expertise lies in the .NET platform, especially C#, with deep experience in DDD, CQRS, and Event Sourcing.

I keep up with the latest trends in the industry and have spent the past two and a half years working hands-on with AI-assisted development, focusing on context engineering, structuring sessions and prompts to get the most out of AI tools.
I run Devbit Consulting AB from Vänersborg, Sweden.

experience.title: Freelance System Architect / Developer
experience.description: Freelance consulting. Clients: Worldstream (datacenter deployer), Volvo Energy (IoT cloud backend), Stena Line (booking system modernization).

experience.title: Consultant Architect / Developer
experience.description: Consulting assignments: Worldstream (Go/DDD/CQRS systems), Cuviva (Azure to Kubernetes migration for medtech).

cv.summary: Senior System Architect and Developer with 20+ years in the industry. Specialises in distributed systems, cloud, and clean architecture on the .NET platform (C#) with deep experience in DDD, CQRS, and Event Sourcing.
